name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: TitleMax offers vehicle title loans and secured flex lines of credit with same-day funding. Most credit types accepted; your car title secures the loan, not just your credit score.
description_long:
TitleMax is a title lending company with retail locations across multiple states. The Memphis Summer Avenue location has been serving residents since February 2007, making it one of the longer-established title lending storefronts in the region. The company operates physical stores where applicants can walk in and receive a lending decision on the same day, with bilingual staff available to assist Spanish-speaking customers.

The core product is a vehicle title loan (called a title pledge in Tennessee), which uses the borrower's clear car title as collateral rather than relying solely on credit score. Alongside title pledges, TitleMax offers a secured flex line of credit, giving approved borrowers ongoing access to funds up to a credit limit rather than a single lump sum. The company also offers an unsecured personal line of credit, available both in-store and online, for borrowers who prefer not to use their vehicle as collateral. Online unsecured applications are restricted to residents of AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, and WI.

What sets TitleMax apart within the title lending space is the dual product structure — borrowers can choose between a secured title pledge and an unsecured flex line of credit at the same location. Requirements for title loans are minimal: a vehicle, a clear title, and a valid government-issued ID. The Memphis Summer Avenue store carries a 5.0-star average across 481+ Google reviews, with customers repeatedly citing professional, knowledgeable staff by name. The store is also bilingual, broadening access for Spanish-speaking borrowers.

Title loans carry meaningful financial risk and this profile would be incomplete without acknowledging it. TitleMax does not disclose interest rates or APRs on its website, listing only 'competitive rates' — a vague claim that obscures the true cost of borrowing. Title loans as a product category typically carry triple-digit APRs. Borrowers who cannot repay risk losing their vehicle, which can compound financial hardship. TitleMax is not a substitute for mainstream credit and is best treated as a last resort when other options have been exhausted.
pros: Most credit types accepted — vehicle title supplements credit score evaluation
Borrowers keep driving their vehicle throughout the loan term
Offers both secured (title pledge) and unsecured (personal LOC) products at the same location
Bilingual staff available for Spanish-speaking customers
5.0-star average across 481+ Google reviews at the Memphis Summer Avenue location
Flex line of credit allows withdrawals over time rather than forcing a single lump-sum draw
cons: Interest rates and APRs are not disclosed on the website — 'competitive rates' is uninformative
Vehicle repossession is the consequence of default on title loans
Store is closed Sundays, limiting access for weekend emergencies
Online unsecured line of credit is only available in 11 states
Title loan requires a clear vehicle title — borrowers with liens on their car do not qualify
best_for: Car owners with poor or thin credit who need same-day emergency cash
Borrowers who have been denied by traditional lenders and own their vehicle outright
Tennessee residents who need a flexible line of credit rather than a fixed lump-sum loan
Spanish-speaking borrowers seeking bilingual in-person service
diagnosis: TitleMax is best suited for car-owning borrowers with damaged or limited credit who need emergency cash the same day and cannot qualify for personal loans or credit union alternatives. The primary caveat is cost transparency — APRs are not published, title loans as a category typically carry very high rates, and defaulting puts the borrower's vehicle at risk, making this a high-stakes product that should be a last resort rather than a first stop.
services: Secured flex line of credit using vehicle title
Unsecured personal line of credit (online, select states)
Online application for unsecured line of credit
Credit check with vehicle value as collateral offset
Vehicle value assessment for loan sizing
